face.structure: heart-shaped with high cheekbones and a pointed chin

eyes.color: dark hazel with subtle gold flecks

face.expression: keen and analytical with hints of skepticism

skin.texture: smooth with barely visible freckles across the nose
skin.rendering_notes: subtle gradient shading to highlight cheekbones

hair.style: long, straight with a blunt fringe
hair.flow: neat and silky, with slight movement at the tips
details: slight wave at the lower ends

character.aura: intense and focused with a subtle hint of mystery

outfit.base: fitted dark navy blazer over a crisp white blouse

composition.framing: mid-length portrait focusing on upper torso and head
composition.pose: standing with one arm crossed over the chest, the other lightly touching the chin
composition.gesture: calm and introspective, with a hint of defiance in posture

background.color_palette: cool tones of blues and greys
background.details: slight blur effect to focus on the character
background.rules: no stark contrasts that compete with the character's presence
